basis: MGB official flood susceptibility class is Moderate at the representative point.

Nearest MMDA flood-prone point is approximately 1.38 km away; repeated flood-prone point clusters exist within approximately 1.41 to 1.53 km.
limitations: Representative point only; not a cadastral or surveyed palace-complex boundary.
